summary: Iteration 15 - Carousel Posts, User Search, Post Deletion. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). All new features working correctly: user search returns results without password leak, carousel posts with media_urls array, owner-only post deletion with 403 for non-owners.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/users/search?q=mario - PASSED: Returns matching users, no password/password_hash leaked, excludes current user
GET /api/users/search?q=tutor - PASSED: Finds tutor user correctly
POST /api/posts with media_urls array - PASSED: Creates carousel post with multiple images
GET /api/posts - PASSED: All posts include media_urls array (backward compat working)
GET /api/posts/{id} - PASSED: Single post has media_urls field
DELETE /api/posts/{post_id} as owner - PASSED: Successfully deletes post
DELETE /api/posts/{post_id} as non-owner - PASSED: Returns 403 Forbidden
GET /api/users/{user_id}/posts - PASSED: User posts include media_urls array
seed_data_creation: Created test carousel posts during testing, cleaned up TEST_ prefixed posts after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 15 backend features verified: 1) User search endpoint (GET /api/users/search) works with username/name regex match, excludes current user, no password fields leaked 2) Carousel posts with media_urls array field fully functional 3) Post deletion with owner authorization (403 for non-owners, 404 for nonexistent) 4) Backward compatibility maintained - old posts without media_urls stored return [media] in media_urls array.

user_search_tests.GET /api/users/search?q=mario: PASSED - Found user, no password leaked

carousel_posts_tests.POST /api/posts with media_urls: PASSED - Carousel post created with 3 images
carousel_posts_tests.GET /api/posts media_urls field: PASSED - All posts have media_urls array
carousel_posts_tests.Backward compat for old posts: PASSED - Old posts populate media_urls from media field

mocked_api_note: No APIs are mocked. All endpoints are fully functional.
